plugin_desc: Baseline SNMP child template for UTStarcom DSLAM and broadband access devices under enterprise PEN 4666. The current MIB facts confirm the enterprise root and Access device class, but no reliable row-filter-free scalar CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-supply OID was confirmed. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Access SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics including 64-bit ifHCInOctets/ifHCOutOctets, and aggregate device traffic. Supported brands/models — UTStarcom DSLAM and broadband access devices that expose standard IF-MIB.
name: Access
